dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
dangerZone.deleteMessage:
This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

• All your personal data will be removed
• Your games will continue but you will appear as "Anonymous"
• Your friends and friend requests will be removed
• Active games will be forfeited

Are you sure you want to continue?
dangerZone.confirmMessage: To confirm, please type DELETE (all caps) below:
dangerZone.incorrectMessage: You must type DELETE exactly to confirm account deletion.
dangerZone.successMessage: Your account has been successfully deleted. You will now be logged out.
dangerZone.timeoutMessage: The request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
dangerZone.failedMessage: Failed to delete account. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

objective.title: Objective
objective.intro: To win Coral Clash, complete one of these goals:
objective.checkmateDesc: your opponent's Whale (when the Whale is in
objective.coralPlaced: A player has placed all their Coral
objective.whaleRemaining: A player only has their Whale remaining
objective.backRowReached: A Crab or Octopus reaches the opponent's back row
objective.areaControlledDesc: Count the amount of coral of your color that is not occupied by one of your opponent's pieces.

setup.title: Game Setup
setup.boardDesc: The board is an 8x8 grid with 64 squares. Each player has:
setup.units: 17 units: 1 Whale, 2 Dolphins, 4 Turtles, 2 Pufferfish, 4 Crabs, and 4 Octopuses
setup.variants: Each piece type comes in two variants:
setup.hunterDesc: pieces (without four coral icons) can remove Coral
setup.gathererDesc: pieces (with four coral icons) can place Coral

turnOverview.title: Turn Overview
turnOverview.intro: White goes first, then players alternate. On your turn:
turnOverview.step2: Resolve any Capture, Hunter, or Gatherer effects
turnOverview.step3: Check if any objectives have been met

movement.title: How Pieces Move
movement.importantDesc: Pieces cannot move through other pieces - they must have a clear path.
movement.variants: Each piece type comes in two variants that interact with Coral differently:
movement.hunterMovementDesc: Coral - they cannot move through it
movement.gathererMovement: (with four coral icons) are more powerful - they can pass

whale.name: Whale
whale.intro: The Whale is your most important piece - if it's checkmated, you lose! The Whale occupies two squares and has two distinct movement options:
whale.slidingMoveDesc: Move half of the piece any number of squares horizontally, vertically, or diagonally while maintaining its original orientation. The Whale follows Hunter movement rules - it is stopped by coral. However, there is one special exception (see below).
whale.rotationMoveDesc: Rotate half of the piece to an adjacent square (one square vertically or horizontally). When selecting a rotation, first tap the destination square (shown with a white circle). If there are multiple valid orientations, you'll then tap the orientation square (shown with a green circle). If there's only one valid orientation, the whale will automatically move without showing the orientation selection.
whale.checkRulesDesc: The Whale may never end its movement in check (where it could be captured), but it CAN move through threatened squares.
whale.doubleCaptureDesc: The Whale can capture up to two enemy pieces in a single move - one with each half of its body!
whale.doubleCoralRemovalDesc: When the Whale (acting as a Hunter) lands on coral, it can choose to remove one or both coral pieces. If both halves land on coral, you can remove both, just one, or neither. If only one half lands on new coral (while the other half is already on coral), you can choose to remove that one coral piece.
whale.specialCaseDesc: If half of the Whale is already sitting on coral, that coral does NOT block the other half from moving through or onto the same coral square.

dolphin.name: Dolphin
dolphin.movement: Moves any number of squares vertically, horizontally, or diagonally.

turtle.name: Turtle
turtle.movement: Moves any number of squares vertically or horizontally.

pufferfish.name: Pufferfish
pufferfish.movement: Moves any number of squares diagonally.

crab.name: Crab
crab.movement: Moves one square vertically or horizontally.

capture.title: Capture
capture.desc: Move to a square occupied by an enemy piece. Whales can capture two pieces in one move.

hunterEffect.title: Hunter Movement & Effect
hunterEffect.desc: Hunter pieces (without coral icons) have two important behaviors:

gathererEffect.title: Gatherer Effect
gathererEffect.desc: Gatherer pieces (with four coral icons) can place Coral on empty squares they move to.

drawResignation.title: Draw & Resignation
drawResignation.stalemateDesc: When a player has no legal moves and their Whale is not in check
drawResignation.threefoldRepetitionDesc: Same position occurs three times with the same player to move
drawResignation.resignationDesc: A player may resign at any time

versionWarning.title: Update Available
versionWarning.message: Please update to the latest version for the best experience.
